scope: V1 gallery active before/after visual role gate
rule: This file is not a substitute for looking at the images. Update it only after direct visual inspection of the actual current image files/contact sheet. Filenames, alt text, catalog stages, old reports, and DOM order are not enough.

cases.visual_reviewer: Codex local visual check, limited by user-supplied before/after folder grouping
evidence: direct local inspection of the source folder contact sheet for Pinus_Parviflora/Neuer Ordner (3)
source folder explicitly separates do and pislia subfolders
before detail frames show upright young candles on Pinus parviflora and Viktor working with hand shears
after result frames show calmer pads after seasonal candle-growth control
converted WebP files were checked for dimensions and current SHA256 hashes
before_visual_signs: wooden planter Pinus parviflora reads denser and less settled before the hand work
source before frames include Viktor at work, upright young candles and dense pad detail
after_visual_signs: wooden planter Pinus parviflora reads calmer after young candle-growth control
after frames show two result angles from the same source group
do_not_claim: do not call this a rescue
do not claim identical camera angle
do not claim a heavy structural redesign; this is seasonal candle/growth control
do not rely on old gallery filenames instead of the source folder grouping
cases.risk: VERIFIED_WITH_LIMITS because before and after are source-folder grouped rather than identical camera-angle proof.

cases.visual_reviewer: Codex local visual check after user screenshot correction
evidence: direct local image inspection of hecke-niwaki-nachher-01.webp and hecke-niwaki-vorher-02.webp
user screenshot correction in current Codex thread on 2026-06-26: the controlled close-up frame must be Nachher, and the wider site-context frame must be Vorher
current galerie.html/en/galerie.html/uk/galerie.html card and modal DOM
before_visual_signs: rougher and less controlled outer hedge line in site context
reads as a pre-correction context frame despite the filename containing nachher
after_visual_signs: hedge mass reads as controlled and rounded
cleaner finished form despite the filename containing vorher
do_not_claim: do not trust the filename words vorher/nachher
do not mark the controlled rounded frame as before
do not mark the rougher site-context frame as after
cases.risk: Filename labels are misleading. Future edits must use visual evidence and Viktor/user screenshot correction, not filename text.
